top_signals.title: ‘Rally slows into resistance’: Bitcoin stalls below $78,000 as ETF outflows and long liquidations deepen recovery doubts
top_signals.summary: Bitcoin trades near $77,500 as ETF outflows extend to four days, long liquidations mount, and analysts flag $80,000 as the next key test.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: EnerMech Teams Up with Optilift for Smart Offshore Crane Ops
top_signals.summary: Energy services firm EnerMech has signed a multi-year global collaboration agreement with Norway-based technology company Optilift to expand technology-enabled crane and lifting operations across the offshore energy sector.The agreement combines…
